docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCOY, WAUKEEN DBA LAW OFFICES OF WAUKEEN MCCOY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRUIHL, EASTELLER DBA STAR REPORTING SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCOY, WAUKEEN DBA LAW OFFICES OF WAUKEEN MCCOY $9,704.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,904.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF FOR SERVICES RENDERED TO PLAINTIFF OVER THE CAUSE OF ALMOST ONE YEAR, DURING WHICH COMPLAINTS WERE NOT MADE ABOUT THE QUALITY OF PLAINTIFFS SERVICES AND THE SERVICES CONTINUED TO BE REQUESTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-09-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Park Jennings of the Law Offices of Waukeen Q. McCoy (415.675.7705) appearing for and with defendant/appellant Waukeen Q. McCoy; No other appearances.

9:55 am This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo, having been assigned to this department by the Presiding Judge. Appellant is present with counsel and there is no appearance by respondent. The matter is put over to 2:00 pm this afternoon for appellant to file a proof of service of the September 25, 2013 order that continued the hearing to this date.

2:00 pm Appellant is present with counsel. There is still no appearance on behalf of respondent. Appellant provides the Court with an endorsed-filed copy of a proof of service of the order continuing the matter to this date.

The Court proceeds with no evidence presented on behalf of respondent. The matter is taken under submission. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
